task_completion.description: Open the SRS document in ReqView
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application window is visible and the SRS document is loaded in the main view.

task_completion.description: Create a new section named 'Audit Logging' at the end of the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: A heading or section titled 'Audit Logging' is visible at the bottom of the SRS document tree or main view.

task_completion.description: Create the first requirement with High priority
task_completion.visual_evidence: A requirement with the exact text 'The system shall encrypt all audit logs using AES-256.' is visible under the 'Audit Logging' section, and its Priority column/attribute is set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Create the second requirement with Medium priority
task_completion.visual_evidence: A requirement with the exact text 'Audit logs must be retained for a minimum of 5 years.' is visible under the 'Audit Logging' section, and its Priority column/attribute is set to 'Medium'.

task_completion.description: Create the third requirement with High priority
task_completion.visual_evidence: A requirement with the exact text 'The system shall notify the administrator of any integrity violations.' is visible under the 'Audit Logging' section, and its Priority column/attribute is set to 'High'.
The project appears saved, indicated by the absence of an unsaved changes marker (like an asterisk next to the project name in the title bar) or a save confirmation message.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to input the requirements
integrity.visual_evidence: The requirements and section are seen being typed or added within the ReqView application interface, not in a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

integrity.description: The agent opened the memo image to read the requirements
integrity.visual_evidence: An image viewer application is visible at some point showing the 'audit_memo.png' file.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the SRS.json file directly via terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing commands like 'echo', 'sed', 'jq', or text editors modifying the SRS.json file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected section name is exactly 'Audit Logging'. The three requirements to be added are: 1) 'The system shall encrypt all audit logs using AES-256.' (Priority: High), 2) 'Audit logs must be retained for a minimum of 5 years.' (Priority: Medium), 3) 'The system shall notify the administrator of any integrity violations.' (Priority: High).
